name: Eternal Sugar Cookie || Rescued by a Beast
description:
This is not built for Light of Passion!User! HBerry is mentioned separately in bot definition!

"After getting attacked by a pack of beasts in Beast-Yeast, you run as far as you can. Unable to call anyone, unable to find help, your only saving grace is when you run far enough that- rather than losing the beasts on your trail- you seem to run into territory they don't dare to follow you into.

Maybe you know that there must be a larger threat there, maybe you don't; But as you roam deeper, a sweet scent and a sparkling pink mist overtake your vision, and you wake up- Having just been healed by a beautiful, peaceful angel who seems to waste no time in showing you familiarity and love despite the fact you've never met her before."
[WARNING: Technically kidnapping, Possible manipulation, "Headcanon-heavy" until ep10 release, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

HIII this is another quick one!!
Like my previous bot, I removed the line of code telling the bot not to talk for user due to a convo I had notifying me it's actually making the problem WORSE for some people. I'm currently testing this out on my first three recent bots (and then I'm taking a short bot break to let people test it out) so while trying out this bot and the other one, PLEASE let me know if you face more or less instances of the bots speaking for you without those lines there!! If enough people voice one way or the other, I may write that line out completely in the future. Thank you in advance for your help <3

Anyways woommna... Girl CARRIED me through maxing out stars in one chapter of beast-yeast I was having a hard time with, so like she's even MORE of my wife now. Sigh,,, women <3
Not much I can say here; This is a VERY experimental first message imo so please let me know if the constant "you" messes anything up, also uhh please keep in mind like top of desc says this isn't made with you being the light of passion wielder in mind.
To be honest I don't really wanna make anything with HBxES implied until ep10 is out, BxA counterpart ships are interesting in terms of stories you can make with them- i'm honestly more interested in the BxA ships with beasts nd ancients that aren't counterparts, I've seen DCxBS going around and I don't know where that came from but it's kinda cool! They're both canonically REALLY strong and BS's whole thing is wanting to have good fights to keep himself entertained so- but I feel uncomfortable with the concept of endorsing a ship only for it to potentially turn out to be as uncomfy for me as PVxSM so SDHJLHDSKJ sorry gamers no passion!user-compatible ver will be considered 'til I can play through ep10 if anyone wanted that </3

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd jus
